channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned vehicle parked in peabody estate, 4th July
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle parked in peabody estate's carpark with deflated tires for over 6 months, vehicle does not belong to any residents at the address and has no permit. Car parking space is limited and this abandoned van is not helping the situation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox with entrails on road, 4th July
item.description:
Dead fox in middle of road near Kokum on East Dulwich Road. On side of road heading towards Lordship Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on speed bump, 4th July
item.description:
This has been her for over a month and getting worse causing damage to car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "Statutory light nuisance from street lamp outside 5 Green Lane, SE9 2AF, 4th July
item.description:
I am reporting a statutory light nuisance caused by the LED street lamp located directly outside my property. This has been an ongoing problem for a significant amount of time, and the intensity of this light is excessive; it is beaming directly into my bedroom window and illuminating the room even with my blinds fully closed, as shown in the attached photos. This persistent light intrusion is causing severe sleep deprivation and significantly impacting my health. An adjustment to the angle will not resolve this. I am formally requesting the installation of a house-side shield (cowl) on this unit to stop the light trespass into my home. I would appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on grass verge between grays farm school and Kemnal school, 4th July
item.description:
Now the grass has been cut. It has exposed vast amounts of litter on the grass verge between the two schools.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several areas of Sandy lane covered in litter ., 4th July
item.description:
Extensive litter in several areas of Sandy lane. Very bad at the moment. Including discarded bag of wire in road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Street Light not working Pole 18J1492, 3rd July
item.description:
The Street light does not come on at Night. this happens every month or every other month -0 always this light near 93 Westcombe Hill SE3 7DU pole number 18J 1492

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
